industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Holaluz-Clidom, S.A.
summary: Holaluz-Clidom, S.A. produces and sells electricity and gas. It generates renewable energy from wind, waste, biogas, photovoltaic solar, biomass, and hydraulic sources. The company was formerly known as Clidom Energy, S.L. Holaluz-Clidom, S.A. was incorporated in 2010 and is based in Barcelona, Spain.
